overview.value: Peace Lily is a leafy indoor plant with white spathes that appear above dark green foliage. It prefers evenly moist soil and stable indoor conditions.

localizedContentsJSON.value: {"en":{"commonName":"Peace Lily","overview":"Peace Lily is a leafy indoor plant with white spathes that appear above dark green foliage. It prefers evenly moist soil and stable indoor conditions.","tips":"Wipe leaves regularly so the plant can photosynthesize efficiently."},"zh-Hans":{"commonName":"白掌","overview":"白掌有浓绿叶片和白色佛焰苞，花序高于叶丛。它喜欢土壤保持微湿和稳定的室内环境。","tips":"定期擦拭叶片能提高光合作用效率，也能让叶片更有光泽。"}}
